source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
gu'-ni, gu'-nits (guni):

(1) The name of a Naphtalite clan (Ge 46:24; Nu 26:48; 1Ch 7:13). In Nu 26:48 the gentilic "Gunites" is also found, having in Hebrew the same form, with the article.

(2) The head of a Gadite family (1Ch 5:15).
